---
title: "Contact"
toc: false
---

## Organizing committee

For any questions about the Peritoneal Summit — program, abstracts, registration, sponsorship, or media — please contact:

**Joel Zindel** (lead organizer)
[joel.zindel@biol.ethz.ch](mailto:joel.zindel@biol.ethz.ch)
ETH Zürich · Institute of Molecular Health Sciences

## Co-organizers

- **Inge K. Herrmann** — ETH Zürich / Empa
- **Erin Greaves** — Warwick Medical School
- **Sarah Herrick** — University of Manchester

<!-- TODO: optional — add direct emails for co-organizers once confirmed -->
